_comment: Ground truth dataset for OCR + topic detection validation. Manually transcribe a small sample of questions per exam (10-15 questions each) for at least one math and one biology exam. Used by validation.py to measure OCR accuracy and topic-detection F1.

_schema.subject: string
_schema.expected_topics: list of topic keys from TOPIC_RULES
_schema.questions: list of {page: int, id: str, text: str}
